nasb.text: “You shall weave the tunic of checkered work of fine linen, and shall make a turban of fine linen, and you shall make a sash, the work of a weaver.

esv.text: “You shall weave the coat in checker work of fine linen, and you shall make a turban of fine linen, and you shall make a sash embroidered with needlework.

cnv.text: 你要用細麻線編織雜色內袍，用細麻布做禮冠，又用刺繡的手工做腰帶。

ccb.text: “要用杂色的细麻线织成祭司的内袍，用细麻布做礼冠，腰带上要有刺绣，
